question: Restore Britain ≥4% in Makerfield by-election?
reason: Rebecca Shepherd's candidacy for Restore Britain in Makerfield by-election faces significant challenges.
evidence: Rebecca Shepherd announced as Restore Britain's candidate for Makerfield by-election. ([lbc.co.uk](https://www.lbc.co.uk/article/restore-britain-announces-makerfield-by-election-candidate-5HjdZMb_2/?utm_source=openai))
In 2024, Reform UK's candidate Robert Kenyon secured 31.8% of the vote, reducing Labour's majority to 5,399. ([makerfieldbyelection.co.uk](https://makerfieldbyelection.co.uk/?utm_source=openai))

Recent polls indicate strong support for major parties, with Reform UK at 40% and Labour at 43%. ([electionpolling.co.uk](https://www.electionpolling.co.uk/by-elections/2026/06/18/makerfield?utm_source=openai))
